# Charles W. Clark — Multidisciplinary Designer & Art Director

> Print, web, entertainment, SaaS, and now experimental AI — 20+ years of designing across every medium I can get my hands on.

## About

Charles W. Clark is a multidisciplinary designer and art director with over 20 years of experience spanning print, web, interactive, entertainment, B2B SaaS, and experimental AI. Currently Senior Designer at DemandScience, where he helps clients with creative, supports internal marketing teams with design and production, and implements AI into daily tools and workflows.

His career began at the Copperas Cove Leader-Press and Killeen Daily Herald, where he cut his teeth on newspaper layout and production. He then spent over a decade at NUVO Newsweekly in Indianapolis, growing from designer to Production Manager — overseeing the design team while maintaining print schedules and production. He also learned photography at NUVO, which became a lasting part of his practice.

Charlie left NUVO to pursue digital design, which led to a Senior Interactive Designer role and work in the entertainment and gaming space — including projects for Pokemon Black & White, Pokedex 3D Pro, Enter the Gungeon, Wargaming, Ronin Tactics, FieldCraft Survival, SKYCURSER, and the Asian Art Museum of San Francisco. His concert photography has covered artists like Pixies and Yo La Tengo.

Today at DemandScience, he works in B2B SaaS — helping clients with creative, supporting internal marketing teams with design and production, and championing best-use-case implementation of AI across the organization.

In his spare time, Charlie creates experimental art under the name Saboteur. By night, he works on Tommy's — a comic book where he handles all art and production.

## Specialties

- Brand identity and visual systems
- Digital product design (web, mobile, interactive)
- Print design and production management
- B2B SaaS marketing design
- Entertainment and gaming creative
- Concert and editorial photography
- AI implementation in design workflows
- Art direction across all media

- [Playground](https://www.charleswclark.com): Experimental art, side projects, and personal explorations

## Notable Clients & Projects

- DemandScience / Terminus — B2B SaaS design and AI implementation
- Pokemon Black & White v2 — Entertainment design
- Pokedex 3D Pro — Interactive entertainment
- Enter the Gungeon: House of the Gundead — Gaming
- Wargaming — Gaming creative
- Ronin Tactics — Tactical lifestyle brand
- FieldCraft Survival — Outdoor/tactical brand
- SKYCURSER — Arcade gaming
- Asian Art Museum San Francisco — Cultural institution
- NUVO Newsweekly — Alt news publication (10+ years)
- Copperas Cove Leader-Press / Killeen Daily Herald — Newspaper print
